scriptLines:
query: '-- 1. Las madres oficiales del SEGIP (Tus datos originales)
SELECT DISTINCT
    CAST(ci AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ci,
    CONCAT(nombres, ' ', apellido_paterno, ' ', COALESCE(apellido_materno, '')) AS nombre_completo,
    municipio_residencia,
    CAST(fecha_nacimiento AS DATE) AS fecha_nacimiento
FROM segip_silver
WHERE ci IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

-- 2. Las Madres Faltantes (Miembros Inferidos) detectadas en las transacciones
SELECT 
    CAST(t.ci AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ci,
    'Madre no registrada en SEGIP' AS nombre_completo,
    'Desconocido' AS municipio_residencia,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS fecha_nacimiento
FROM (
    -- Recolectamos todos los CIs de las tablas médicas/financieras
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria AS ci FROM bja_controles_prenatales_silver WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria AS ci FROM sup_controles_silver WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_madre AS ci FROM bja_controles_pediatricos_silver WHERE ci_madre IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_madre AS ci FROM bja_partos_silver WHERE ci_madre IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria AS ci FROM bja_pagos_silver WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria AS ci FROM spl_afiliaciones_silver WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria AS ci FROM bja_inscripciones_silver WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria AS ci FROM sup_inscripciones_silver WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
) AS t
-- Cruzamos contra el SEGIP para ver cuáles NO existen
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(ci AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ci
    FROM segip_silver
    WHERE ci IS NOT NULL
) AS s ON CAST(t.ci AS VARCHAR(50)) = s.ci
WHERE s.ci IS NULL',
